We just got the approval for our first hotfix of the PS4 version of Bus Simulator from Sony. The update to version 2.04 is now available for download. It includes the following fixes:
- Stability improvements (this should also prevent corrupted savegames)
- Multiplayer Savegame Server (PS4 multiplayer savegames are nor stored and synced on a separate and PS4 exclusive server)
- Loka-Fix: "Ping Pong" to "Round Trip" (corrected name in the drive settings)

PS: For Xbox One, the extended first hotfix for the Xbox One version is still waiting for approval from Microsoft. It includes stability improvements to prevent the random crashes on Xbox One as well a number of general performance improvements. As soon as we successfully absolved the approval process, we will release the update immediately. Once again sorry to all of the players who are experiencing problems right now and a big thank you for your patience!

More updates are already under construction and will follow as soon as possible! :-)
